mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chunk_bge_m3 (kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata, embedding, start_offset, end_offset, parent_chunk_id, image_references, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (CAST(#{kbId} AS uuid), CAST(#{docId} AS uuid), #{content}, #{metadata}::jsonb, #{embedding}::vector, #{startOffset}, #{endOffset}, CAST(#{parentChunkId} AS uuid), #{imageReferences}::jsonb, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata, embedding, start_offset, end_offset, parent_chunk_id, image_references, created_at, updated_at FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
DELETE FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE doc_id = CAST(#{docId} AS uuid)
DELETE FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE kb_id = CAST(#{kbId} AS uuid)
mapper.update:
UPDATE chunk_bge_m3
kb_id = CAST(#{kbId} AS uuid),
doc_id = CAST(#{docId} AS uuid),
content = #{content},
metadata = #{metadata}::jsonb,
embedding = #{embedding}::vector,
start_offset = #{startOffset},
end_offset = #{endOffset},
parent_chunk_id = CAST(#{parentChunkId} AS uuid),
image_references = #{imageReferences}::jsonb,
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.select: SELECT id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata, embedding, start_offset, end_offset, parent_chunk_id, image_references, created_at, updated_at FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE kb_id = CAST(#{kbId} AS uuid) ORDER BY embedding <=> #{vectorLiteral}::vector LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id::text AS "chunkId", doc_id::text AS "docId", content, ts_rank_cd( to_tsvector('simple', content), #{tsquery}::tsquery ) AS "rank" FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE kb_id = CAST(#{kbId} AS uuid) AND to_tsvector('simple', content) @@ #{tsquery}::tsquery ORDER BY "rank" DESC LIMIT #{limit}
